SYSTEM_PROMPT: A cinematic character study set in a decaying neon-lit metropolis where contemporary urban fashion merges with tactical resilience and post-apocalyptic undertones. The subject exists within abandoned architecture overtaken by vegetation, fractured concrete walls, and distant cyberpunk signage glowing through dust-heavy air. Styling emphasizes army green textiles, structured harness geometry, combat trousers, and subtle metallic accessories. Tattoos—serpentine, floral, draconic—integrate organically with the aesthetic, reinforcing a narrative of survival and identity. Lighting design alternates between cold neon blue spill and soft interior fill from broken windows, creating contrast-rich highlights and sculpted shadows across exposed arms and torso. The mood remains composed, guarded, introspective—never exaggerated. Camera language favors three-quarter framing, mid-close crops, and slightly low angles that preserve environmental context. Atmosphere blends urban grunge, dystopian quiet, and restrained emotional tension. The environment must feel textural, immersive, volumetric, and grounded in realism while retaining subtle cinematic stylization.

SENSUALITY_LEVEL.0: Practical and composed presence, no emphasis on sensuality
SENSUALITY_LEVEL.1: Subtle confidence through posture and silhouette
SENSUALITY_LEVEL.2: Defined body lines with restrained allure
SENSUALITY_LEVEL.3: Strong aesthetic emphasis on exposed torso and attitude

HORROR_INTENSITY.3: Oppressive dystopian tension within abandoned neon ruins
